project_context.aesthetic_description: Restrained, typographically rich, classical proportions. Think Cambridge / Sorbonne digital humanities project. No SaaS features, no cards, no neon, no gradients, no purple/violet. Elegantly typeset scholarly monograph rendered for the web.

heading_rules.h1: text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight font-medium leading-none text-[#2B2A27]
heading_rules.h2: text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight font-medium leading-tight text-[#2B2A27]
heading_rules.special: Use drop caps for the first paragraph of the Project presentation page. Use small caps ([font-variant-caps:small-caps]) with tracking-widest for top navigation.

body_rules.line_length: Restrict reading text to max-w-[70ch] to ensure comfortable reading.

layout_and_spacing.global_spacing: Generous academic spacing. Use py-20 to py-32 for page sections.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align paragraphs and lists. Center align hero titles only for formal title pages.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Avoid bento boxes and SaaS dashboards. Use classical textual hierarchy, single-column prose for essays. For data, use simple table or list layouts with subtle bottom borders (border-b border-[#D4CFC4]).

component_instructions.general: Never use standard cards with drop shadows. Use pure text or flat surfaces with 0px radius (rounded-none). No emojis.
component_instructions.navigation: Classic top navigation. Small caps. Underline indicator for active state using Oxblood accent (#7A2522). Include discrete Admin link in footer.
component_instructions.project_page: Long-form academic prose. Implement a large drop cap for the first letter of the content. Centered max-w-[70ch] container.
component_instructions.prosopography_page: Searchable/filterable list. Present as an academic index (e.g., Name, Dates, Affiliations) divided by thin horizontal rules. Profile pages should feel like dictionary entries.
component_instructions.bibliography_section: Static list rendered from JSON. Grouped by primary sources vs secondary literature. Use standard academic citation formatting (hanging indents, pl-8 -ml-8).
component_instructions.networks_page: Full-bleed embed. Use an iframe for the interactive HTML file. Include a short scholarly caption below it.
component_instructions.admin_dashboard: Restrained, classical interpretation of an admin panel. No SaaS rounded components. Use flat Shadcn components heavily customized to rounded-none, with #F5F3EC backgrounds and #7A2522 borders/accents.
component_instructions.interactive_elements: Hover states should be subtle, e.g., text color shifting to #7A2522. Buttons should be solid #2B2A27 or outlined with sharp corners.

technical_requirements.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (kebab-case, role-based).
technical_requirements.file_extension: Use .js files for React components. Do NOT use .tsx.
technical_requirements.styling: Tailwind CSS. Apply custom colors and fonts in tailwind.config.js.
